<var>
$DPS$ = (Damage * Burst Count)  / (Burst Cooldown + (Firerate * Burst Count))
$DPS2$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$TE$ = $FNC-TOTAL-EXP$
$FNC-COST$ = 300; 325; 500; 1250; 2100; 3350; 6400
$FSE-DETECTION$ = 1; ; 2
$EXP$ = {{#expr:floor(75 * 1.075^(Level - 1) * (Level > 0))}}
$FSE-UPGRADE$ = Tactical Gear; Convergent Forces; Cyber-Enforcer; Synchronized Vision; Threat Detection Sentinel; 1000-THR E.M.
$FSE-UPGRADEICON$ = 70928079601135; 114583008682832; 104986848983674; 76868080888172; 83041543058774; 119843960971904
$FSE-CATEGORY$ = Evolved
$R$ = $FNC-RECURSION$
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>Calculated as (Damage × Burst Count) ÷ (Cooldown + (Firerate × Burst Count)).</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Burst Count !! Firerate !! Burst Cooldown !! Range !! Coordination Damage Boost !! Coordination Radius !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 6 || 0.12 || 1.6 || 14 || N/A || N/A || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 6 || 0.12 || 1.6 || 14 || N/A || N/A || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 6 || 0.12 || 1.4 || 16 || 5% || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 8 || 0.1 || 1.4 || 16 || 5% || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 7 || 8 || 0.1 || 1.4 || 16 || 5% || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 7 || N/A || 0.16 || 0 || 17 || 5% || 5 || $DPS2$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 6 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || N/A || 0.16 || 0 || 17 || 7.5% || 5 || $DPS2$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
<!-- @se-ignore -->
|-|Levels =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="12" |Levels
|-
! Level !! Exp !! Total Exp
|-
| 0 || {{Exp|0}} || {{Exp|$TE$}}$R$
|-
| 1 || {{Exp|$EXP$}}$R$ || $R$
|-
| 2 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 3 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 4 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 5 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 6 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 7 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 8 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 9 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 10 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 11 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 12 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 13 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 14 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 15 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 16 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 17 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 18 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 19 || $R$ || $R$
|-
| 20 || $R$ || $R$
|}
</div>
<!-- @/se-ignore -->
</tabber></div>
